fixes.origin:
query = (
    "SELECT rule_name FROM routing_rules "
    "WHERE source = '" + source + "' "
    "ORDER BY rule_name"
)

cursor.execute(query)
fixes.replacement:
query = (
    "SELECT rule_name FROM routing_rules "
    "WHERE source = ? "
    "ORDER BY rule_name"
)

cursor.execute(query, (source,))
